results.notes: Baseline 1. CPU-only. No grid search, frozen config. val_accuracy=0.9889, val_macro_f1=0.9882.
Baseline 2 (DistilBERT). epochs=3 max_steps=-1 bs=32 lr=2e-05 bf16=True max_length=128. val_accuracy=0.9961 val_macro_f1=0.996.
Main model (Qwen2.5-7B QLoRA generative). epochs=3 max_steps=-1 per_device_bs=4 grad_accum=4 effective_bs=16 lr=0.0002 bf16=True max_seq_length=256. parse_errors=1/3500.
Baseline 1 — BANKING77. CPU-only. No grid search, frozen config (identical hyperparameters to Bitext TF-IDF for comparability). val_accuracy=0.8499, val_macro_f1=0.8422.
Baseline 2 — BANKING77 (DistilBERT). epochs=10 max_steps=-1 bs=32 lr=2e-05 bf16=True max_length=128. val_accuracy=0.9099 val_macro_f1=0.9081.
Re-evaluation of adapter qwen_lora_banking77_20260420_3eb1a21 with fixed parser cascade. No retrain. Gen settings: greedy, max_new_tokens=24. val_acc=0.9124 test_acc=0.9165 test_parse_errors=7/3079.

known_retros.issue: metric_for_best_model name mismatch silently disabled early stopping in 5-epoch run
known_retros.resolution: metric name aligned with compute_metrics output + epochs raised to 10

known_retros.issue: response_template dual-role: loss-masking anchor + parser contract diverged
known_retros.resolution: parser patched with bare-label + fuzzy-match fallback, no retraining
